About Me

Who I Am

I'm a second-year B.Tech student in Computer Science and Engineering at Galgotias University, passionate about coding and problem-solving. I have a solid foundation in Java programming, and I'm currently strengthening my skills in Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) to build efficient and scalable solutions.

I enjoy learning new technologies and exploring different areas of computer science, including software development and AI/ML. My goal is to grow as a software engineer by working on real-world projects, improving my coding skills, and contributing to innovative tech solutions.

I've built a Java GUI Hospital Management System with MySQL, led a team on a Student Management System, and created a live Carbon Footprint Calculator with real-time charts. I've also solved 300+ DSA problems on LeetCode & GeeksforGeeks and hold certifications from Oracle Academy, NPTEL (IIT Madras), and Guvi HCL.

Projects

Things I've Built

Real projects developed during B.Tech — each solving a genuine problem with clean code and solid fundamentals.

View on GitHub
Java · GUI MySQL · JDBC Team Lead November 2025
🏥 Hospital Management System

A full desktop application built in Java with a Swing GUI and MySQL backend via JDBC. Manages hospital operations — patients, doctors, bed allocation, and appointments — with persistent data and transaction support to prevent double-booking.

Patient records with auto-generated IDs, age, gender, address and full management
Doctor management with specialization tracking linked to appointments
Real-time bed allocation — AVAILABLE / OCCUPIED status with release functionality
Full CRUD via JDBC with transaction support · Multithreading for smooth GUI
JavaJava SwingJDBCMySQL 8.0OOPMultithreading
GitHub Repository
View on GitHub
Web · JavaScript Chart.js February 2026
🌍 Carbon Footprint Calculator

An interactive web-based tool estimating weekly CO₂ emissions from driving, electricity, flights, and diet. Built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks — with three live chart visualizations and actionable eco-tips.

Calculates weekly CO₂ across 4 inputs: driving, electricity, flights, and diet
Three live charts: Bar (by category), Pie (renewable vs non-renewable), Line (trend)
Actionable eco-tips with estimated CO₂ savings per suggestion
Fully responsive dark UI — zero dependencies, vanilla JavaScript only
HTML5CSS3JavaScriptChart.js
GitHub Repository
View on GitHub
Java · Console Team Lead 2024 – 25
🎓 Student Management System

A console-based Java application led by Abhay Fulara (team of 4) for the OOP course. Features a clean three-layer architecture — model, service, and storage — with CRUD operations on student records via a text menu interface.

Add, view, search by ID, and delete student records with full CRUD support
Subject-wise mark tracking with automatic pending fee calculation
Three-layer architecture: User (model) → UserService (logic) → UserStorage (data)
Team: Abhay Fulara (lead), Ankit Kumar Yadav, Harshit Yadav, Ujjawal Gupta
JavaOOPArrayListScannerJDK
